nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=42 beats='morning light peeks into the cozy burrow and Pip Vole wakes to a warm toasty smell drifting from the kitchen; today is baking day with Grandma Vole, the best day of all; Pip hops out of bed and scampers down the root tunnel'>>

choices.label: Scamper to the burrow kitchen.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=40 beats='Grandma Vole ties Pip’s little apron in a bow and props up the old worn recipe card for seed-honey buns; first the recipe needs the big brown mixing bowl from the shelf; Pip rolls up his sleeves, ready to help'>>

choices.label: Go get the big brown bowl.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='the kitchen bowls stand in a tall wobbly tower on the low shelf, and the big brown mixing bowl sits at the very bottom of the stack; Pip reaches out his paws; he can lift the top bowls off one at a time or slide the bottom bowl out fast'>>

choices.label: Lift the top bowls off one at a time.
Slide the bottom bowl out fast.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the tower teeters and totters and the wooden bowls clatter down all around Pip, one landing on his head like a silly hat; nothing breaks and nobody is hurt; Grandma chuckles, says one at a time, little paws, and helps him stack the tower back up'>>

choices.label: Try the bowl shelf again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Pip lifts the bowls off one by one, steady and slow, until the big brown bowl is free; he carries it to the table like a treasure; Grandma gives his ears a proud pat; next the recipe card says flour'>>

choices.label: Fetch the flour crock.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='the flour crock sits open on the table, full to the brim with soft pale flour; Grandma holds the big brown bowl steady while Pip picks up the little wooden scoop; he can scoop small scoops nice and slow or tip the whole crock over the bowl at once'>>

choices.label: Scoop small scoops, nice and slow.
Tip the whole crock over at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='a big white flour cloud poofs up and Pip sneezes the squeakiest sneeze, achoo, and now he has a flour mustache and flour eyebrows; Grandma giggles and wipes his nose with her apron, saying little scoops, slow paws; Pip dusts himself off, ready to try again'>>

choices.label: Dust off and scoop again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='three soft scoops of flour whisper into the big brown bowl, one, two, three; Grandma peeks in and says just right, little baker; Pip beams under his clean whiskers; now the recipe card says seeds'>>

choices.label: Open the seed jar.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='the seed jar glitters with stripy sunflower seeds, and one shiny brown acorn sits on top, saved to crown the biggest bun; Pip hugs the jar close; he can pour the seeds into the bowl in a slow gentle stream or shake the jar hard upside down to hurry'>>

choices.label: Pour the seeds in a gentle stream.
Shake the jar hard upside down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='seeds sprinkle every which way and the shiny acorn plops out, bounces off the table, and rolls away down the burrow hall; Pip scampers after it past the pantry and around the root cellar, paws pattering, while Grandma sweeps up seeds and laughs her warm laugh'>>

choices.label: Catch that rolling acorn!

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the acorn spins to a stop against Grandma’s slipper and Pip pounces on it with both paws, got it; he trots back to the table holding it high like a prize; Grandma says gentle pours, no shakes, and hands him the seed jar again'>>

choices.label: Pour the seeds again, gently.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='the seeds patter into the flour in a slow gentle stream and speckle it like freckles; the shiny acorn waits safely in Grandma’s pocket for the biggest bun; the recipe card says honey comes next, and honey is Pip’s favorite part'>>

choices.label: Bring the honey pot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Grandma opens the golden honey pot and cups her warm paws over Pip’s paws on the spoon; together they drizzle a slow shiny spiral over the flour and seeds, round and round; Pip licks one sweet drip off his thumb and grins'>>

choices.label: Stir it all together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Pip stirs the wooden spoon in slow round circles, like stirring soup, while Grandma turns the bowl; the flour and seeds and honey hug together into a soft speckled dough; Pip pokes it and it springs right back; Grandma says now the dough needs a little nap to grow puffy'>>

choices.label: Let the dough have a little nap.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the dough naps under a checked cloth by the warm stove while Pip and Grandma sip mint tea in the big chair; Grandma tells how she baked seed-honey buns with her own grandma long ago in this very kitchen; then she peeks under the cloth and the dough is puffy and ready'>>

choices.label: Shape the buns with Grandma.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Grandma dusts the table with flour and rolls one perfect round bun to show Pip how, smooth as a river pebble; the shiny acorn is ready to crown the biggest one; Pip pats his own lump of dough; he can roll neat round buns just like Grandma’s or squish fun shapes, stars and snails and hats'>>

choices.label: Roll neat round buns like Grandma’s.
Squish fun shapes, stars and snails.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Pip rolls bun after bun, round and smooth, and lines them up on the tray in tidy rows; Grandma presses the shiny acorn on top of the biggest one; the tray slides into the warm oven and the whole burrow starts to smell wonderful'>>

choices.label: Watch and wait by the warm oven.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Pip squishes a wiggly star, a curly snail, and a bun shaped just like Grandma’s sun hat; Grandma laughs her happy laugh and presses the shiny acorn onto the snail; the tray slides into the warm oven and the whole burrow starts to smell wonderful'>>

choices.label: Watch and wait by the warm oven.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='through the little oven window Pip watches his round buns puff up fatter and fatter; the burrow smells of honey and toasty seeds; Grandma says the little bell will ting when the buns are done; Pip can wait for the bell or open the door for a tiny peek'>>

choices.label: Wait for the little bell.
Open the door for a tiny peek.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Pip opens the oven door a crack and warm air whooshes out, whoosh, and the buns sigh and slump a little; Grandma closes the door gently and whispers that buns need their beauty sleep; sure enough the buns begin to puff right back up while Pip hums a waiting song'>>

choices.label: Wait by the warm oven again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='ting goes the little bell and Grandma slides out a tray of golden seed-honey buns, round and perfect, steam curling off their tops and the acorn shining on the biggest one; Pip claps his floury paws; now comes the very best part of baking day'>>

choices.label: Have a teatime picnic with Grandma.
Take warm buns to the neighbors.
Line up the batch on the windowsill.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='through the little oven window the star points turn golden and the snail bun puffs up round; the burrow smells of honey and toasty seeds; Grandma says the little bell will ting when the buns are done; Pip can wait for the bell or open the door for a tiny peek'>>

choices.label: Wait for the little bell.
Open the door for a tiny peek.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Pip cracks the door open and a puff of warm steam curls his whiskers into silly squiggles; Grandma laughs softly and shuts the door, saying the steam likes to stay in with the buns; Pip pats his whiskers flat and watches the wiggly shapes keep puffing'>>

choices.label: Wait by the warm oven again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='ting goes the little bell and out comes the funniest tray in the whole burrow, a golden star, a curly snail with the shiny acorn on top, and a bun just like Grandma’s hat; Pip and Grandma giggle together; now comes the very best part of baking day'>>

choices.label: Taste the wiggly star bun first.
Draw the new buns on the recipe card.
Show the silly buns to the neighbors.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Pip and Grandma spread the checked cloth under the round burrow window and share warm seed-honey buns with mint tea, just the two of them; the honey is sweet and the seeds go crunch; Pip snuggles under Grandma’s arm, already dreaming of the next baking day'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Pip carries the basket of warm buns down the burrow hall and knocks on every round door; the mouse twins and old Mister Mole sniff the honey smell and cheer; soon the whole burrow is munching happily, and everyone says Pip is a proper little baker now'>>

ending.title: Warm Buns for the Whole Burrow

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Pip lines the golden buns along the windowsill in a proud tidy row, with the acorn bun in the middle like a little king; Grandma counts them and every single one is just right; she tells Pip he tried and tried until he got it, and that is what makes a perfect batch'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Pip bites the wiggly star bun while it is still warm and honey-sweet, and it is the most delicious bun he has ever tasted; Grandma tries the hat bun and declares it scrumptious; the buns look funny and taste wonderful, and that is the very best kind of bun'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Grandma fetches her pen and Pip draws a star bun, a snail bun, and a hat bun right on the old recipe card, next to the writing from long ago; Grandma writes Pip’s Wiggly Buns underneath; together they have discovered a brand-new family recipe to bake forever'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Pip parades the funny tray down the burrow hall and the neighbors come peeking out of every round door; the mouse twins pick the star, old Mister Mole picks the hat, and everyone giggles and munches; silly buns, it turns out, make the whole burrow smile'>>
